description: Workflow for processing pet entity in Purrfect Pets API
name: purrfect_pets_workflow

transitions.description: Set default status if missing or blank
transitions.end_state_description: Pet status has been set to default if it was missing or blank
transitions.name: set_default_status

transitions.end_state_description: Pet creation timestamp has been set if missing
transitions.name: set_created_at
transitions.start_state_description: Pet status has been set to default if needed

transitions.description: Set default tags if missing or empty
transitions.end_state_description: Pet tags have been set to default if missing or empty
transitions.name: set_default_tags
transitions.start_state_description: Pet creation timestamp has been set

transitions.description: Enrich pet entity with category info asynchronously
transitions.end_state_description: Pet entity enriched with category information
transitions.name: enrich_category
transitions.start_state_description: Pet tags have been set to default if needed

transitions.description: Perform fire-and-forget asynchronous tasks such as audit logging
transitions.name: fire_and_forget_tasks
transitions.start_state_description: Pet entity enriched with category information
